name: settlemesh
description: Deploy and monetize an agent-built app in one command — SettleMesh OAuth login, a managed database, usage-based billing, and end-user payments. Bundles the SettleMesh MCP server (search + invoke the full capability catalog).

interface.shortDescription: Deploy and monetize agent-built apps: login, database, usage billing, end-user payments.
interface.longDescription: SettleMesh turns an agent-written app into a live, paid product in one command (settlemesh deploy --full-stack): managed OAuth login, a managed database, usage-based metered billing, and end-user payments (the signed-in user's own balance pays). Also a capability catalog over MCP/CLI — web search/scrape, LLMs, image/video, managed SQL, hosted agents — every call metered with a quote up front.
defaultPrompt: Deploy this app with SettleMesh, including login, a database, and usage billing.
Show me the SettleMesh capabilities for this task and quote any paid action first.
Turn this agent-built app into a paid product with end-user billing.
